execution_boundary.summary: DID resolution and documents do not execute governed actions.

preparation_boundary.summary: Resolved identifier and verification-method data can prepare actor evidence.

commitment_boundary.summary: Current DID evidence may inform actor and controller review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Method-specific representations must not silently change identity meaning.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown DID methods or unresolved documents require explicit handling.

authority_boundary.summary: Control of an identifier is not universal action authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Resolution state, verification methods, and document changes matter at commit time.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: DID, method, resolved document, version context, and verification references support reconstruction.

interoperability_path.summary: DID evidence can enter actor identity review with editor-draft caution preserved.

next_required_action: add resolution, method, rotation, and stale-document fixtures
